com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

Class ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.ActionBase
      • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.Nested.Base
        • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.With.Base<U>
          • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U>
  • Type Parameters:
    U - Type of the value with which child Action is executed.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Action, Nested, With<U>, ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation
    Enclosing interface:
    ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation

    public static class ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U>
extends With.Base<U>
implements ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation
    A "with" action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
